message:
🌱 Add opentofu: Provider configurations with `for_each` are not compatible mission (#833)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentofu-2917-provider-configurations-with-for-each-are-not-compatible-with-mock",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentofu: Provider configurations with `for_each` are not compatible with `mock_provider` in test configurations",
+    "description": "Provider configurations with `for_each` are not compatible with `mock_provider` in test configurations. This issue affects 21+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify the issue symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your OpenTofu configuration:\n```bash\ntofu version\ntofu validate\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the feature context",
+        "description": "Review the upstream issue: https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/2917"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Provider configurations with `for_each` are not compatible\u2026",
+        "description": "This is just a few tweaks to the program that updates https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1496 each day.\n\nThe main motivation here is that we now use pull requests rather than issues to represent RFCs that have not yet been approved, and so the ranking of issues labeled \"rfc\" was misleading\n```hcl\nresource \"aws_s3_bucket\" \"this\" {\n  for_each = toset(var.regions)\n  bucket = \"rp-test-abc-${each.value}\"\n  provider = aws.by_region[each.value]\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade OpenTofu to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade OpenTofu:\n```bash\n# Using Homebrew\nbrew upgrade opentofu\n\n# Or download the latest release\n# See https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\ntofu version\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Provider configurations with `for_each` are not\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by running:\n```bash\ntofu validate\ntofu plan\n```\nConfirm that the original error no longer occurs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is just a few tweaks to the program that updates https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1496 each day.\n\nThe main motivation here is that we now use pull requests rather than issues to represent RFCs that have not yet been approved, and so the ranking of issues labeled \"rfc\" was misleading to include.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "resource \"aws_s3_bucket\" \"this\" {\n  for_each = toset(var.regions)\n  bucket = \"rp-test-abc-${each.value}\"\n  provider = aws.by_region[each.value]\n}",
+        "mock_provider \"aws\" {\n  alias = \"by_region\"\n}",
+        "mock_provider \"aws\" {\n  alias = \"by_region\"\n  for_each = toset(var.regions)\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentofu",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentofu"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/2917",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/pull/3081"
+    },
+    "reactions": 21,
+    "comments": 4,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "tofu"
+    ],
+    "description": "OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:42:42.242Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
